overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character in a long dark coat walking through a dense, foggy forest at night. The scene transitions from a narrow rocky corridor to an open woodland area with atmospheric lantern lighting, culminating in an encounter with a mysterious standing figure.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed rocky corridor shrouded in dense blue fog. Tall cliff walls flank both sides of the dirt path, with occasional pine trees visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching a lit clearing

events.description: distant warm orange light becomes visible through the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path toward the distant light source

bushes and low vegetation along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The rocky corridor opens into a wider forest path. A mysterious warm light glows in the distance through the fog, and the vegetation becomes denser with tall pine trees lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest clearing with wooden lanterns and fences

events.description: passing by lit wooden lanterns illuminating the path with warm light
encountering a standing humanoid figure in the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past lanterns and approaching a mysterious figure standing motionless in the fog

wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
large rocky outcrop visible behind the fence

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open area illuminated by wooden lanterns casting warm light on the fog. A mysterious humanoid figure stands motionless in the path ahead. The character walks past the figure and continues into the misty clearing beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rocky pass that gradually opens into a lantern-lit woodland clearing. It begins by trailing a character in a dark coat through a narrow corridor of towering cliff walls and dense blue fog. As the path widens, the rocky walls recede to reveal a denser forest of tall pine trees, while a mysterious warm glow begins to pierce through the mist in the distance. The scene then expands into an open area illuminated by wooden lanterns that cast a golden light across the fog, revealing a motionless humanoid figure standing in the path. Finally, the camera follows the character as they walk past the silent figure and disappear into the misty clearing beyond.
